today we were cheated, sold a tour where we were supposed to take a picture with Hollywood and Beverly Hills written on it, and got off the bus. where just drive around celebrity houses, when I arrived and asked for details about the tour, a vendor at an address near McDonald's and where small tourist buses leave , near stop 6808 Hollywood Blvd #6808, Los Angeles, CA 90028, confirmed the second time on an Instagram video , yes you stop everywhere and take a picture , when I said during the live broadcast , that there was no stop , he said to write to you company about the driver . Then I called the police , he immediately packed all his tourist things and didn't even pick up the phone , the policeman told me that now the company would take us for free for pictures , and wanted to tell the seller , but the seller said that he didn't tell me that and that I didn't understand English.   Recording video of him selling the tour is there. Also the brochure was different when he was selling to us, and the police record of the call is also there where he says different, he just ran away like a fraud in minutes, what happens

Ignore the 5 star reviews. At the end of the tour they bribe you with a free t shirt if you leave one. This tour company is terrible and I wouldn't give them a 5 star review no matter what they offered. 

I have been on 4 LA tours and this was by far the worst. The guy who sold it to us blatantly lied about where we would go and what we'd see. 

They didn't even take us to get a picture at the Hollywood sign which we were promised beforehand. 

The homes tour was rushed and it felt like the tour guide was making it up as he went along. 

We got ditched for a rest room stop at Beverley Hills for 25 minutes on a 90 minute tour! 

When the driver was asked if we were stopping at the Hollywood sign he said it was illegal, hmm, done it  3 times before buddy. 

Worst of all was that instead of the banter and fun chat with the driver and pop quiz I'd enjoyed with previous tour guides, this driver actually kept telling people to shut up when we were talking!!! It was like being on a school trip. 

Then at the end of the tour he said he didn't get paid as a tour guide and a $10 tip was expected. I don't mind tipping for good service, but this was awful and it begs the question of where the 30 or so people's $35 went if he doesn't get paid. 

And at the end of the tour we were dumped about a mile away from where we boarded!!!!

Avoid like the plague!!!!

DO NOT BOOK WITH HOLLYWOOD TOURS (TCP 35888)

We paid cash for a tour and were promised the bus would arrive at 11:45 AM. By 12:10 PM, there was still no bus, so we requested a refund. The operator refused to return our money, and when a bus finally arrived, it did not have enough seats for our group.

After checking, we discovered that their TCP license (35888) is revoked, meaning they should not be operating tours at all.

This company is scamming customers. They are operating illegally and unethically. Avoid them at all costs.

We are filing complaints with the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) and the Better Business Bureau. If this happened to you, we recommend you do the same.
